scope: review v015e dev outliers plus protected/manual controls for reference and evaluation-shape caveats before v016 prompt authoring
source_truth_boundary: This audit does not mutate source references or declare corrected truth. It records prompt-lab caveats for later v016 design.

cases.notes: No source-recorded reference-shape caveat. Treat the 7 false negatives as prompt-recall evidence unless later visual audit finds a source issue.
No source-recorded reference-shape caveat. The 10 false positives and 10 false negatives indicate misplaced enumeration rather than confirmed source-shape trouble.
No source-recorded reference-shape caveat. Treat the extra prediction as prompt precision evidence.
No source-recorded reference-shape caveat. Treat the 12 false negatives as dense-scene prompt-recall evidence unless later visual audit finds a source issue.
No source-recorded reference-shape caveat. The zero-match, one-FP/one-FN shape suggests wrong target or boundary selection.
No source-recorded reference-shape caveat. Treat the four extra predictions as prompt precision evidence.
No source-recorded reference-shape caveat. Treat the missed secondary buildings as prompt recall evidence.

large_foreground_reference_target.label: target_1
large_foreground_reference_target.note: Large reference box can make an oversized prediction look numerically better than it looks visually.

cases.notes: Keep 101 as a manual diagnostic. Do not optimize v016 solely against its aggregate metric because reference/eval shape caveats and a broad prediction box complicate interpretation.
No source-recorded reference-shape caveat. Treat the extra prediction as prompt precision evidence.
No source-recorded reference-shape caveat. Treat the false negatives as prompt recall evidence.
Protected object-not-found control passed and must remain a no-regression gate.
Holdout protected control was not run. Track as reference-only and do not tune directly before a separate approved holdout wave.

audit_conclusion.v016_design_effect: Treat most reviewed outliers as prompt-relevant, but keep 101 and 166 out of direct prompt-authoring optimization until a later approved review/run.
